# platformAddNode

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformAddNode

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformAddNodeMutation(); mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddNodeInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformAddNodeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformAddNodeMutation();
mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddNodeInput>' });
```
